Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Laxman Das Responses To Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogatories, Request For An Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions In The Sum Of $1,285.00
Off Calendar Nov-25-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. STEVEN ELSTER, ESQ., Tel No. 925-324-2159 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Plaintiff's counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF ZEMACH HOLDINGS LLC'S Motion For An Order Compelling Laxman Das' Responses To Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogatories, Request For An Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions In The Sum Of $1,285.00, Plaintiff ZELMACH HOLDINGS, LLC's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and special interrogatories is GRANTED. Defendant LAXMAN DAS is hereby ORDERED to provide complete, verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Set No. One and Special Interrogatories, Set No. One served by Plaintiff on October 21, 2014. The responses must be served upon counsel for Plaintiff ZELMACH HOLDINGS, LLC within 15 days of service of Notice of Entry of the Order on this motion. Plaintiff's request for monetary sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $1,285.00 against Defendant LAXMAN DAS to be payable to "Steven Elster in trust for Zelmach Holdings, LLC" by certified funds within 15 days of service of Notice of Entry of the Order on this motion. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
